picks.reasoning: Frank Lampard's Coventry arrive as marginal away favourites and are backed by a strong run-in record. Blackburn's 3.75 home price reflects their inconsistent form — they're not a credible favourite at that price. Coventry's 2.05 still offers value over our estimated 53% true probability. Lampard sets up tactically disciplined sides for big late-season clashes and Coventry will be well-organised for this one.

picks.match: FC St. Pauli vs 1. FC Köln
picks.reasoning: St. Pauli at the Millerntor is one of the most hostile away venues in the Bundesliga. Their passionate support creates an intense atmosphere that historically lifts the team in late-season fixtures. Ladbrokes list Köln as marginal favourites at 2.40, but this underweights the home advantage effect. We estimate a 38% true win probability vs 34.8% implied — modest but positive edge.
